ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the employee */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the company (e.g., Worklife Balance, Relocation) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the employee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "job_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Job satisfaction level of the employee (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "work_life_balance" INTEGER /* Work-life balance level of the employee (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "date_of_hire" TEXT /* Date of hire of the employee */,
  "date_of_leave" TEXT /* Date of leave of the employee (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., UK, US) */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_centers" (
  "cost_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost center */,
  "cost_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the cost center (e.g., Marketing, Finance) */,
  "cost_center_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cost center */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated to the cost center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  "head_of_department" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department (referencing the `employees` table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "job_title_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the job title */,
  "job_level" TEXT /* Level of the job title (e.g., entry-level, mid-level, senior-level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_turnover" (
  "turnover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnover event */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who left */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the employee left */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter the employee left (e.g., 2015 Q1) */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month the employee left (e.g., 2015-03-01) */,
  "voluntary_turnover" INTEGER /* Whether the turnover was voluntary (1) or not (0) */,
  "reason_for_staying" TEXT /* Reason why the employee chose to stay (for non-turnover events) */,
  "turnover_type" TEXT /* Type of turnover (e.g., voluntary, involuntary) */,
  "replacement_cost" TEXT /* Cost of replacing the employee (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_turnover_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_cost_center" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost center assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "cost_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cost center */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was assigned to the cost center */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee's assignment to the cost center ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_cost_center_cost_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_center_id") REFERENCES cost_centers ("cost_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_cost_center_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_department" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was assigned to the department */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee's assignment to the department ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_department_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_department_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_job_title" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was assigned to the job title */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee's assignment to the job title ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_job_title_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_job_title_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, Manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
